summary: Implement layered AI for full Alpha runs
acceptance_criteria: Layered AI can operate strategic, diplomatic, succession, policy, campaign, and recovery decisions across a full Alpha run without player rescue.
Every AI action is emitted as the same GameCommand payload available to the player and every no-action/wait/target/change decision exposes bounded reason traces.
AI layers are deterministic, explicitly ordered, bounded in candidate counts, and cannot mutate authoritative state outside command submission.
The implementation avoids a future-proof general manager, hidden scoring singleton, runtime script engine, server service, telemetry dependency, or manual node battle assumptions.
required_tests: AI property/regression tests cover command parity, trace truncation, deterministic tie-breakers, no rescue hooks, full-run survival, and reason coverage for no-action/wait/withdraw/target/policy/diplomacy decisions.
notes: Layered AI means bounded decision strata, not a general manager abstraction.
No AI-specific privileged command path is allowed.
If AI needs new read models, keep them serializable and protocol-visible.
